skills.name: semantic_cv_parser
skills.description: Extracts structured sections (experience, education, skills, projects) from unstructured PDF and Word files.

skills.name: skills_mapping_matrix
skills.description: Compares candidate capability profiles against role profiles using a semantic graph of IT technologies.

skills.name: gap_detection_engine
skills.description: Finds career gaps, short tenures, and mismatching seniority levels in candidate histories.

skills.name: interview_question_synthesizer
skills.description: Formulates tailored technical and behavioural questions targeting weak spots discovered during CV analysis.
